nodes.returns: The transform origin (translation — a practical base point), the 16-number row-major matrix, and whether a permanent override is active.

nodes.name: ModelItem.ResetTransform
nodes.description: Removes permanent transform overrides, restoring items to their original position. To reset every override in the whole document, set resetAll to true — an unwired or empty items input alone does nothing (and errors) so an empty upstream filter can never wipe all placement work.

inputs.name: items
inputs.description: The model items to reset.

inputs.name: resetAll
inputs.description: True to reset EVERY transform override in the document (items may then be left unwired). Explicit opt-in — an unwired or empty items list alone never wipes the whole document.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

outputs.name: items
outputs.description: The reset items (empty when every override was reset via resetAll).

nodes.name: ModelItem.RotateAboutAxis
nodes.description: Rotates model items by an angle (degrees) about an axis through a point. A permanent override: undoable, saved in the NWF, removed by ModelItem.ResetTransform. Re-runs accumulate.

inputs.name: items
inputs.description: The model items to rotate.

inputs.name: origin
inputs.description: A point on the rotation axis (document units): a Point or a list of three numbers.

inputs.name: axis
inputs.description: The axis direction (need not be unit length): a Vector or a list of three numbers.

inputs.name: degrees
inputs.description: The rotation angle in degrees (right-hand rule around the axis).

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

nodes.name: ModelItem.SetTransform
nodes.description: Sets the permanent transform override of model items to an absolute 4×4 matrix (16 numbers, row-major, translation at indices 3/7/11) — mirror-place or scale-in-place for power users. Unlike Translate/RotateAboutAxis this REPLACES any earlier override; re-runs are idempotent.

inputs.name: items
inputs.description: The model items to transform.

inputs.name: matrix
inputs.description: 16 numbers, row-major (translation at indices 3, 7, 11; bottom row 0 0 0 1), or four rows of four numbers, or a matrix from ModelItem.GetTransform.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

nodes.name: ModelItem.Translate
nodes.description: Moves model items by a vector, in document units (chain Units.Convert for meters/feet). A permanent override: undoable, saved in the NWF, removed by ModelItem.ResetTransform. Re-runs accumulate — each run moves the items again.

inputs.name: items
inputs.description: The model items to move.

inputs.name: vector
inputs.description: The offset, in document units: a Vector (Vector.ByCoordinates) or a list of three numbers.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

nodes.name: Units.All
nodes.description: Every unit name accepted by Units.Convert and Units.ScaleFactor.

nodes.name: Units.Convert
nodes.description: Converts a length value from one unit to another (e.g. Feet to Millimeters).

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The value to convert.

inputs.name: fromUnits
inputs.description: Source units (e.g. "Feet").

inputs.name: toUnits
inputs.description: Target units (e.g. "Millimeters").

nodes.name: Units.Current
nodes.description: The display units of a document (all API lengths, areas and volumes use them).

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

nodes.name: Units.ScaleFactor
nodes.description: The multiplier that converts a length from one unit to another.

inputs.name: fromUnits
inputs.description: Source units (e.g. "Feet"); unit names as in Units.Current.

inputs.name: toUnits
inputs.description: Target units (e.g. "Millimeters").

outputs.name: factor
outputs.description: The scale factor (multiply a source value by it).

nodes.name: SavedViewpoint.Apply
nodes.description: Makes a saved viewpoint the current view (camera, plus any saved overrides).

inputs.name: viewpoint
inputs.description: The saved viewpoint to apply.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

nodes.name: SavedViewpoint.ByName
nodes.description: Finds a saved viewpoint by its display name (searches folders too).

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: The viewpoint's display name.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

nodes.name: SavedViewpoint.Delete
nodes.description: Deletes a saved viewpoint by name (searches folders too). Returns false when absent — safe for clean re-runs of batch generation.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: The viewpoint's display name (folders are searched too).

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

outputs.name: deleted
outputs.description: True when a viewpoint was deleted; false when no viewpoint has that name.

nodes.name: SavedViewpoint.Folder
nodes.description: The folder containing a saved viewpoint: its path as "A/B" ("" for top-level viewpoints) and the folder itself — drives folder-based status workflows.

inputs.name: viewpoint
inputs.description: The saved viewpoint, or its display name.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

nodes.returns: The folder path ("A/B"; "" at the top level) and the immediate folder (null at the top level).

nodes.name: SavedViewpoint.MoveToFolder
nodes.description: Moves a saved viewpoint into a folder (appended at the end). A viewpoint already in the folder is left alone, so re-runs are clean.

inputs.name: viewpoint
inputs.description: The saved viewpoint, or its display name.

inputs.name: folder
inputs.description: The target folder (e.g. from Viewpoints.CreateFolder), or its name.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

outputs.name: viewpoint
outputs.description: The moved stored viewpoint (pass-through for chaining).

nodes.name: SavedViewpoint.Name
nodes.description: The display name of a saved viewpoint.

inputs.name: viewpoint
inputs.description: The saved viewpoint.

nodes.name: SavedViewpoint.Rename
nodes.description: Renames a saved viewpoint (accepts the viewpoint or its current name; searches folders too). Batch-rename via lacing.

inputs.name: viewpoint
inputs.description: The saved viewpoint, or its current display name.

inputs.name: newName
inputs.description: The new display name.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

outputs.name: viewpoint
outputs.description: The renamed stored viewpoint (pass-through for chaining).

nodes.name: Viewpoint.SaveCurrent
nodes.description: Saves the current view as a new saved viewpoint. An existing top-level viewpoint with the same name is replaced.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Display name for the new viewpoint.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

nodes.name: Viewpoint.SetSectionBox
nodes.description: Applies a section box around a region on the current view (Sectioning > Box, scriptable) — chain ModelItem.BoundingBox for the clash-viewpoint close-up look. enabled=false turns sectioning off.

inputs.name: boundingBox
inputs.description: The box region, in document units (e.g. from ModelItem.BoundingBox or BoundingBox.ByCorners). Ignored when enabled is false.

inputs.name: enabled
inputs.description: True to section to the box, false to disable sectioning.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

outputs.name: done
outputs.description: True when the clip planes were applied to the current view.

nodes.name: Viewpoints.All
nodes.description: All saved viewpoints in a document, including those inside folders.

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

outputs.name: viewpoints
outputs.description: Every saved viewpoint, including those nested in folders (animations are skipped).

nodes.name: Viewpoints.CreateFolder
nodes.description: Creates a folder in the Saved Viewpoints window, optionally nested under a parent folder. An existing same-named folder in that location is reused, so re-runs are clean.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: The folder's display name.

inputs.name: parentFolder
inputs.description: Parent folder for nesting (null creates at the top level).

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

outputs.name: folder
outputs.description: The stored folder (an existing same-named folder in that location is reused).

nodes.name: Viewpoints.FromClashResults
nodes.description: Batch-generates one saved viewpoint per clash result, camera aimed at the clash and named after the result — the clash-triage staple. Existing same-named viewpoints in the folder are replaced.

inputs.name: results
inputs.description: The clash results (e.g. from ClashTest.Results).

inputs.name: folderName
inputs.description: Viewpoint folder to file them under (null/empty stores them at the top level).

inputs.name: document
inputs.description: The document (defaults to the active document).

outputs.name: viewpoints
outputs.description: The stored viewpoints, one per result, named after the result.

nodes.name: String.Concat
nodes.description: Joins two strings into one.

inputs.name: a
inputs.description: First string.

inputs.name: b
inputs.description: Second string.

nodes.name: String.Contains
nodes.description: Tests whether a string contains the given substring.

inputs.name: str
inputs.description: The string to search in.

inputs.name: searchFor
inputs.description: The substring to look for.

inputs.name: ignoreCase
inputs.description: True to compare case-insensitively.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: True when the substring occurs in the string.

nodes.name: String.EndsWith
nodes.description: Tests whether a string ends with the given suffix.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The string to test.

inputs.name: searchFor
inputs.description: The suffix to look for.

inputs.name: ignoreCase
inputs.description: True (default) to compare case-insensitively.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: True when the string ends with the suffix.

nodes.name: String.FromObject
nodes.description: Converts any value (including whole lists) to its display string.

inputs.name: obj
inputs.description: The value to format.

nodes.name: String.Join
nodes.description: Joins the elements of a list into a single string with a separator.

inputs.name: separator
inputs.description: Text placed between elements.

inputs.name: list
inputs.description: The values to join; non-strings are formatted invariantly.

nodes.name: String.Length
nodes.description: Returns the number of characters in a string.

inputs.name: str
inputs.description: The string to measure.

nodes.name: String.Replace
nodes.description: Replaces all occurrences of a substring with another string.

inputs.name: str
inputs.description: The string to modify.

inputs.name: searchFor
inputs.description: Substring to replace (must not be empty).

inputs.name: replaceWith
inputs.description: Replacement text.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: The string with all occurrences replaced.

nodes.name: String.Split
nodes.description: Splits a string into a list of substrings around a separator.

inputs.name: str
inputs.description: The string to split.

inputs.name: separator
inputs.description: Separator text.

nodes.name: String.StartsWith
nodes.description: Tests whether a string starts with the given prefix.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The string to test.

inputs.name: searchFor
inputs.description: The prefix to look for.

inputs.name: ignoreCase
inputs.description: True (default) to compare case-insensitively.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: True when the string starts with the prefix.

nodes.name: String.Substring
nodes.description: Extracts part of a string from a start index (-1 length = to the end).

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The string to slice.

inputs.name: startIndex
inputs.description: Zero-based index of the first character to take.

inputs.name: length
inputs.description: Number of characters to take; -1 = to the end.

nodes.name: String.ToLower
nodes.description: Converts a string to lowercase.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The string to convert.

nodes.name: String.ToNumber
nodes.description: Converts a numeric string (invariant culture, e.g. "3.14") to a number.

inputs.name: str
inputs.description: The text to parse, e.g. "3.14".

nodes.name: String.ToUpper
nodes.description: Converts a string to uppercase.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The string to convert.

nodes.name: String.Trim
nodes.description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace from a string.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The string to trim.

nodes.name: Workflow.ForEach
nodes.description: Runs a sequence of actions on each item, one item fully before the next — the per-item ordered loop (zoom → isolate → save viewpoint → next) that wiring and lacing cannot express. Wire items and a List.Create of Action.* nodes.

inputs.name: items
inputs.description: The items to iterate. Each element becomes the current item for one pass; an element may itself be a group (a sub-list).

inputs.name: actions
inputs.description: The actions to run per item, in order — build this with List.Create from Action.* builder nodes.

outputs.name: results
outputs.description: One entry per item: the value that item's actions collected (unwrapped when a single value, a list when several, the item itself when none). For a per-item Save Viewpoint workflow this is the list of created viewpoints.

nodes.name: Action.Isolate
nodes.description: Per item: shows the current item and hides everything else (Appearance.Isolate). Place before Save Viewpoint to bake the isolation into each view.

nodes.name: Action.OverrideColor
nodes.description: Per item: overrides the current item's color (Appearance.OverrideColor).

inputs.name: color
inputs.description: A Color, a "#RRGGBB" string, or a list of three numbers.

nodes.name: Action.ResetAppearance
nodes.description: Per item: removes color and transparency overrides from the current item (Appearance.Reset).

nodes.name: Action.SaveViewpoint
nodes.description: Per item: saves the current view as a saved viewpoint named from the item. With bakeVisibility on, the current isolation is stored in the view, so recalling it re-isolates the item. Collected as the loop's per-item result.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Viewpoint name; supports {name}, {index1}, {count} templating (default {name} = the item's name).

inputs.name: folder
inputs.description: Viewpoint folder to file them under (null/empty stores at the top level).

inputs.name: bakeVisibility
inputs.description: True to capture the current hidden/appearance state into the viewpoint, so recalling it re-isolates the item.

outputs.name: action
outputs.description: A save-viewpoint action that collects the created viewpoint.

nodes.name: Action.ShowAll
nodes.description: Per item: un-hides every item in the model (Appearance.ShowAll) — a reset step, e.g. before re-isolating.

nodes.name: Action.ZoomTo
nodes.description: Per item: frames the current item in the view (Camera.ZoomToItems). Place before Save Viewpoint so each view is centred on its item.

inputs.name: paddingFactor
inputs.description: Space to leave around the item (1 = tight fit).
